title: cybelion utriculariae
side_effects: Cybelion utriculariae can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Prolonged use of the plant's extract can lead to liver damage and kidney problems, as well as an increased risk of bleeding due to its anticoagulant properties. In severe cases, improper use of Cybelion utriculariae can cause seizures, convulsions, and even respiratory failure. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
